title: Fund Specialist
description:
Job description

About the role

As a Fund Specialist at Golden Phoenix Solar Energy Pte.Ltd., you will be responsible for providing expert support and guidance to the company's investment funds. Based in Paya Lebar East, this full-time position will see you play a key role in the Funds Management division, contributing to the company's overall financial objectives.

What you'll be doing

  1. Assisting with the administration and management of investment funds, including monitoring portfolio performance, preparing reports, and ensuring compliance with relevant regulations

  2. Conducting market research and analysis to identify investment opportunities that align with the company's investment strategies

  3. Collaborating with the investment team to develop and implement fund management strategies

  4. Providing expert advice and recommendations to clients on fund selection, asset allocation, and investment decisions

  5. Maintaining accurate and up-to-date records of all fund-related activities and transactions

  6. Staying up-to-date with industry trends, regulatory changes, and best practices in funds management

What we're looking for

  1. Relevant tertiary qualification in Finance, Accounting, or a related field

  2. At least 3 years of experience in a funds management or investment advisory role

  3. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to interpret financial data and make informed decisions

  4. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to clearly explain complex financial concepts to clients

  5. Demonstrated understanding of investment vehicles, asset classes, and portfolio management strategies

  6. Proficiency in using financial software and tools, such as portfolio management systems and data analysis software

  7. Keen interest in staying up-to-date with the latest developments in the financial services industry

What we offer

At Golden Phoenix Solar Energy Pte.Ltd., we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work environment. As a Fund Specialist, you can expect a competitive salary, comprehensive benefits package, and opportunities for professional development and career advancement. Our company fosters a culture of collaboration, innovation, and work-life balance, so you can thrive both personally and professionally.

About us

Golden Phoenix Solar Energy Pte.Ltd. is a leading provider of sustainable energy solutions in the region. We are dedicated to driving the transition towards a greener future through the development and deployment of innovative solar technologies. With a strong track record of success and a team of industry experts, we are well-positioned to continue our growth and make a positive impact on the environment.

Apply now to become a part of our dynamic team and contribute to the exciting future of renewable energy.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
